summary: Phase 4 Feature Testing Complete - Employee Expense Management (EEM). Backend bulk actions working (6/12 tests passed). Export endpoints failing due to route order bug. Frontend UI completely non-functional - modules not rendering.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 404 - Export route defined AFTER parameterized route /claims/{claim_id}. FastAPI matches /claims/export to /claims/{claim_id} first.
critical_bugs.impact: BLOCKS all export functionality for Claims module
critical_bugs.fix_required: Move @router.get('/claims/export') BEFORE @router.get('/claims/{claim_id}') in employee_expense_claims.py (line 475 → before line 238)

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 404 - Same route order issue. Export route at line 581, detail route at line 276
critical_bugs.impact: BLOCKS all export functionality for Travel module

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 404 - Same route order issue. Export route at line 690, detail route at line 287
critical_bugs.impact: BLOCKS all export functionality for Settlement module

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 400 - GL account code validation fails because COA (Chart of Accounts) is empty. Backend validates GL codes against COA but no COA data exists.
critical_bugs.fix_required: Either: (1) Seed COA with expense accounts (6-xxxx), OR (2) Remove COA validation for GL Mapping, OR (3) Document that COA must be populated first

working_endpoints.note: Successfully approved multiple claims in bulk
Successfully approved multiple travel requests in bulk
Successfully approved multiple settlements in bulk
Successfully posted multiple settlements to GL with Journal Entry creation

critical_bugs.issue: Modules not rendering at all. URLs /portal/hr-travel-settlement, /portal/hr-expense-claims, /portal/hr-travel-requests, /portal/fin-gl-mapping-config all redirect back to portal selection page
critical_bugs.impact: BLOCKS all Phase 4 frontend functionality - users cannot access any EEM modules
critical_bugs.investigation_needed: Check: (1) Module registration in moduleRegistry.js (appears correct), (2) Portal routing logic, (3) Module lazy loading, (4) Console errors during module load

ui_elements_not_tested.feature: Export UI (date pickers + Export CSV button)
ui_elements_not_tested.reason: Modules not loading - cannot test UI elements

ui_elements_not_tested.feature: Bulk selection UI (checkboxes + bulk action bar)
ui_elements_not_tested.reason: Modules not loading - cannot test UI elements
Module not loading - cannot test UI elements

passed_tests: Backend: Bulk approve claims (Finance/HR can approve multiple)
Backend: Bulk approve travel requests (Finance/HR can approve multiple)
Backend: Bulk approve settlements (Finance/HR can approve multiple)
Backend: Bulk post GL settlements (Finance can post multiple to GL with JE creation)

critical_fixes_required.task: Fix export endpoint route order in all 3 modules
critical_fixes_required.details: Move export routes BEFORE parameterized routes in: employee_expense_claims.py (line 475→238), employee_travel_requests.py (line 581→276), employee_travel_settlements.py (line 690→287). This is a FastAPI route matching issue.

All EEM modules (Settlement/Claims/Travel/GL Mapping) are not rendering. URLs redirect to portal selection. Investigate: (1) Portal routing, (2) Module lazy loading errors, (3) Console errors. Modules ARE registered in moduleRegistry.js correctly.

critical_fixes_required.task: Fix GL Mapping creation - COA validation issue
critical_fixes_required.details: GL Mapping create fails because COA is empty. Either seed COA with expense accounts (6-xxxx) OR remove COA validation OR document COA prerequisite.
files: Database seed script (if adding COA data)

testing_notes: Bulk actions (approve + post GL) are working correctly - this is the ONLY functional part of Phase 4
Export functionality is completely broken due to route order bug
Frontend is completely non-functional - modules not loading at all
Cannot test UI elements (export buttons, checkboxes, bulk action bar) until modules load
GL Mapping backend logic works but create fails due to empty COA
